user_prompt: add the downsampling feature to AudioFifo upon dequeuing, since it already has upsampling as a feature
agent_reply: `dequeueMono`, `dequeueMonoImmediate`, and `dequeueStereo` now accept an optional `sampleRateHz`, defaulting to 16 kHz. If called with `8000`, the FIFO consumes two internal 16 kHz samples per returned sample/frame.
I also simplified [AudioManager.cpp](d:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/AudioManager/AudioManager.cpp:489) so outgoing CVSD now does:
- Forced `AudioManager` into the build with a temporary compile hook: passed.
- Removed the hook and ran normal `pio run` again: passed.
